Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x6418 "WIZ-7000-6418" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $7000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Wiz.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $7000 to display the loading screen and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
Note: the routine also sets all of the nibbles in colour RAM to $07 to allow the loading screen to be displayed correctly.
